stemHtml: Which of the following statements correctly describes the amount of recovery sleep required to repay an accumulated sleep debt? The amount of sleep required to make up a deficit…

options.a: is roughly half the number of hours of sleep missed.
options.b: is at least twice the number of hours of sleep missed.
options.c: is slightly greater than the number of hours of sleep missed.
options.d: equals the number of hours of sleep missed.
